sentence: 园区荣誉有哪些
question: 园区荣誉有哪些

sentence: 园区公共管廊长度
question: 园区公共管廊长度
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 归属园区, TO_CHAR(SUM(pipe_length)) AS 公共管廊总长度 FROM v_ai_ipark_pue_pipe_gallery WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' OR park_name LIKE '%岱山经开区%' GROUP BY park_name;

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 归属园区, TO_CHAR(pipe_name) AS 管廊名称, TO_CHAR(pipe_type) AS 设备类型, TO_CHAR(manage_unit_type) AS 管理单位类型, TO_CHAR(glocation) AS 地理位置信息, TO_CHAR(pipe_length) AS 管廊长度, TO_CHAR(pipe_pcs) AS 管廊层数, TO_CHAR(remark) AS 备注, TO_CHAR(use_date) AS 投用日期 FROM v_ai_ipark_pue_pipe_gallery WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%';

sentence: 园区有多少企业视频监控设备
question: 园区有多少企业视频监控设备
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(video_org_type) AS 视频所属组织类型, TO_CHAR(video_type) AS 视频分类（中文）, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称 FROM v_ai_ipark_platform_video_device_info WHERE (park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' ) AND video_org_type LIKE '%企业%';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS 企业视频监控设备数量 FROM v_ai_ipark_platform_video_device_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND video_org_type LIKE '%企业%';

sentence: 园区企业有多少监测指标传感器
question: 园区企业有多少监测指标传感器
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(equip_code) AS 所属设施, TO_CHAR(equip_name) AS 所属设备设置, TO_CHAR(sensor_number) AS 位号, TO_CHAR(target_type) AS 指标类型, TO_CHAR(target_status) AS 指标状态（中文）, TO_CHAR(alarm_status) AS 报警状态, TO_CHAR(threshold_up) AS 阈值 FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_monitor_metric WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS 监测指标传感器数量 FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_monitor_metric WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%';

sentence: 园区有哪些企业
question: 园区有哪些企业
SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 企业总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%';

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(abbreviatio) AS 企业简称, TO_CHAR(social_credit_id) AS 统一社会信用代码, TO_CHAR(enterprise_size) AS 企业规模, TO_CHAR(enterprise_status) AS 生产状态, TO_CHAR(industry_level_two) AS 所属行业大类, TO_CHAR(establish_date) AS 成立日期, TO_CHAR(factory_area) AS 厂区面积, TO_CHAR(produce_address) AS 生产场所地址, TO_CHAR(enterprise_leader_name) AS 企业负责人, TO_CHAR(en_leader_mobile_phone) AS 企业负责人手机, TO_CHAR(practitioner_num) AS 从业人员人数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%';

sentence: 园区有几家规上企业
question: 园区有几家规上企业
SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 规上企业总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(rules_on_corporate) = '是';

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(rules_on_corporate) AS 是否规上企业, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(abbreviatio) AS 企业简称, TO_CHAR(social_credit_id) AS 统一社会信用代码, TO_CHAR(enterprise_size) AS 企业规模, TO_CHAR(enterprise_status) AS 生产状态, TO_CHAR(industry_level_two) AS 所属行业大类, TO_CHAR(establish_date) AS 成立日期, TO_CHAR(factory_area) AS 厂区面积, TO_CHAR(produce_address) AS 生产场所地址, TO_CHAR(enterprise_leader_name) AS 企业负责人, TO_CHAR(en_leader_mobile_phone) AS 企业负责人手机, TO_CHAR(practitioner_num) AS 从业人员人数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND rules_on_corporate = '是';

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_label) AS 企业标签, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(abbreviatio) AS 企业简称, TO_CHAR(social_credit_id) AS 统一社会信用代码, TO_CHAR(enterprise_size) AS 企业规模, TO_CHAR(enterprise_status) AS 生产状态, TO_CHAR(industry_level_two) AS 所属行业大类, TO_CHAR(establish_date) AS 成立日期, TO_CHAR(factory_area) AS 厂区面积, TO_CHAR(produce_address) AS 生产场所地址, TO_CHAR(enterprise_leader_name) AS 企业负责人, TO_CHAR(en_leader_mobile_phone) AS 企业负责人手机, TO_CHAR(practitioner_num) AS 从业人员人数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%'  AND enterprise_label LIKE '%国高%';

question: 园区有几家单项冠军企业
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_label) AS 企业标签, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(abbreviatio) AS 企业简称, TO_CHAR(social_credit_id) AS 统一社会信用代码, TO_CHAR(enterprise_size) AS 企业规模, TO_CHAR(enterprise_status) AS 生产状态, TO_CHAR(industry_level_two) AS 所属行业大类, TO_CHAR(establish_date) AS 成立日期, TO_CHAR(factory_area) AS 厂区面积, TO_CHAR(produce_address) AS 生产场所地址, TO_CHAR(enterprise_leader_name) AS 企业负责人, TO_CHAR(en_leader_mobile_phone) AS 企业负责人手机, TO_CHAR(practitioner_num) AS 从业人员人数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%'  AND enterprise_label LIKE '%单项%';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS 单项冠军企业总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(enterprise_label) LIKE '%单项冠军%';

question: 园区有几家专精特新企业
SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 专精特新企业总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(enterprise_label) LIKE '%专精特新%';

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_label) AS 企业标签, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(abbreviatio) AS 企业简称, TO_CHAR(social_credit_id) AS 统一社会信用代码, TO_CHAR(enterprise_size) AS 企业规模, TO_CHAR(enterprise_status) AS 生产状态, TO_CHAR(industry_level_two) AS 所属行业大类, TO_CHAR(establish_date) AS 成立日期, TO_CHAR(factory_area) AS 厂区面积, TO_CHAR(produce_address) AS 生产场所地址, TO_CHAR(enterprise_leader_name) AS 企业负责人, TO_CHAR(en_leader_mobile_phone) AS 企业负责人手机, TO_CHAR(practitioner_num) AS 从业人员人数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%'  AND enterprise_label LIKE '%专精特新%';

sentence: 园区今年工业总产值
question: 园区今年工业总产值
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(SUM(park_output_value)) AS 园区总产值 FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE TO_CHAR(report_month) LIKE '{year_value}-0%';
SELECT TO_CHAR(report_month) AS 上报月份, TO_CHAR(park_output_value) AS 园区产值 FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE TO_CHAR(report_month) LIKE '{year_value}-0%'

sentence: 园区今年规上工业总产值
question: 园区今年规上工业总产值
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(SUM(scale_ind_output)) AS 园区规上工业总产值 FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE TO_CHAR(report_month) LIKE '{year_value}-0%'
SELECT TO_CHAR(report_month) AS 上报月份, TO_CHAR(scale_ind_output) AS 园区规上工业产值 FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE TO_CHAR(report_month) LIKE'{year_value}-0%

sentence: 园区今年亩均产值
question: 园区今年亩均产值
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(SUM(output_per_mu)) AS 亩均总产值 FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE TO_CHAR(report_month) LIKE '{year_value}-0%'
SELECT report_month AS 上报月份, output_per_mu AS 亩均产值 FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE TO_CHAR(report_month) LIKE '{year_value}-0%'

sentence: 园区今年亩均税收
question: 园区今年亩均税收
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(SUM(tax_per_mu)) AS 亩均总税收 FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE TO_CHAR(report_month) LIKE '{year_value}-0%'
SELECT TO_CHAR(report_month) AS 上报月份, TO_CHAR(tax_per_mu) AS 亩均税收 FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE TO_CHAR(report_month) LIKE '{year_value}-0%'

sentence: 园区规划面积
question: 园区规划面积
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(planned_area) AS 园区规划面积 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_park_basic_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%';

sentence: 园区基本信息
question: 园区基本信息
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(planned_area) AS 园区规划面积, TO_CHAR(park_address) AS 园区地址, TO_CHAR(park_manager) AS 园区负责人, TO_CHAR(manager_phone) AS 园区负责人电话, TO_CHAR(safety_responsible_person) AS 安全负责人, TO_CHAR(safety_responsible_mobile) AS 安全负责人手机 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_park_basic_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' ;

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(develop_time) AS 发展历程时间, TO_CHAR(content) AS 内容 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_park_development WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' ;
SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(honor_time) AS 获取荣誉时间, TO_CHAR(content) AS 内容 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_park_honor WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' ;

sentence: 园区某月规上工业产值同比增速
question: 园区某月规上工业产值同比增速
SQL: SELECT c.report_month AS current_report_month, l.report_month AS last_year_report_month, TO_CHAR(c.scale_ind_output) AS current_scale_ind_output, TO_CHAR(l.scale_ind_output) AS last_year_scale_ind_output, CASE WHEN l.scale_ind_output = 0 OR l.scale_ind_output IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(ROUND((c.scale_ind_output - l.scale_ind_output) / l.scale_ind_output * 100, 2)) END AS year_on_year_growth_rate FROM (SELECT report_month, CASE WHEN scale_ind_output IS NULL OR scale_ind_output = '' THEN 0 ELSE TO_NUMBER(scale_ind_output) END AS scale_ind_output FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE report_month = '{year_value}-{month_value}') c FULL JOIN (SELECT report_month, CASE WHEN scale_ind_output IS NULL OR scale_ind_output = '' THEN 0 ELSE TO_NUMBER(scale_ind_output) END AS scale_ind_output FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE report_month = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE('{year_value}-{month_value}', 'YYYY-MM'), -12), 'YYYY-MM')) l ON 1=1;

sentence: 园区某月风险走势情况
question: 园区某月风险走势情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(riskTime) AS 统计月份, TO_CHAR(riskLevel) AS 园区每日最高风险等级 FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_park_daily_risk_summary_park WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(riskTime, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM') = '{year_value}-{month_value}' ORDER BY TO_DATE(riskTime, 'YYYY-MM-DD');

sentence: 某企业某月风险走势情况
question: 某企业某月风险走势情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(riskDate) AS 统计月份, TO_CHAR(riskLevel) AS 企业每日最高风险等级 FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_daily_risk_summary_company WHERE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(riskDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM') = '{year_value}-{month_value}' AND TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) LIKE '{company_name}' ORDER BY TO_DATE(riskDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD');

sentence: 园区当前的风险分级管控情况
question: 园区当前的风险分级管控情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(company_type_name) AS 企业类型名称, TO_CHAR(riskObjCount) AS 风险分析对象总数, TO_CHAR(unitCount) AS 风险分析单元总数, TO_CHAR(eventCount) AS 安全分险事件总数, TO_CHAR(measureCount) AS 管控措施总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_ipark_dp_risk_obj;

sentence: 园区近7日的隐患预警统计情况
question: 园区近7日的隐患预警统计情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR('岱山经济开发区') AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(period) AS 时间, TO_CHAR(majorDangerNum) AS 重大隐患预警数, TO_CHAR(potentialDangerNum) AS 隐患临期提醒数, TO_CHAR(overdueDangerNum) AS 隐患超期提醒数 FROM v_ai_ipark_ipark_dp_supervision WHERE period LIKE '%近7天%';

sentence: 园区近1月的隐患预警统计情况
question: 园区近1月的隐患预警统计情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR('岱山经济开发区') AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(period) AS 时间, TO_CHAR(majorDangerNum) AS 重大隐患预警数, TO_CHAR(potentialDangerNum) AS 隐患临期提醒数, TO_CHAR(overdueDangerNum) AS 隐患超期提醒数 FROM v_ai_ipark_ipark_dp_supervision WHERE period LIKE '%近1个月%';

sentence: 园区近3月的隐患预警统计情况
question: 园区近3月的隐患预警统计情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR('岱山经济开发区') AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(period) AS 时间, TO_CHAR(majorDangerNum) AS 重大隐患预警数, TO_CHAR(potentialDangerNum) AS 隐患临期提醒数, TO_CHAR(overdueDangerNum) AS 隐患超期提醒数 FROM v_ai_ipark_ipark_dp_supervision WHERE period LIKE '%近3个月%';

sentence: 园区上周的双重预防机制运行效果如何
question: 园区上周的双重预防机制运行效果如何
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR('岱山经济开发区') AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(COUNT(DISTINCT company_code)) AS 企业总数, TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN evaluation_level = '优' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS 优, TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN evaluation_level = '良' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS 良, TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN evaluation_level = '中' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS 中, TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN evaluation_level = '差' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS 差 FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE cycle_number = '{week_value}' AND calendar_year = '{year_value}';

sentence: 园区隐患排查与整改情况如何
question: 园区隐患排查与整改情况如何
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR('岱山经济开发区') AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR('其他企业') AS 企业类型, TO_CHAR(other_enterprise_inspection_completion_rate) AS 排查任务完成率, TO_CHAR(other_enterprise_hazard_rectification_completion_rate) AS 隐患整改完成率 FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_danger_statistics;

SELECT TO_CHAR('岱山经济开发区') AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR('重大危险源或重大场所') AS 企业类型, TO_CHAR(major_hazard_source_inspection_completion_rate) AS 排查任务完成率, TO_CHAR(major_hazard_source_rectification_completion_rate) AS 隐患整改完成率 FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_danger_statistics;

sentence: 园区实时的作业票预警情况？
question: 园区实时的作业票预警情况？
sql: SELECT park_code AS 园区名称, COUNT(1) OVER(PARTITION BY park_code) AS 报警数, company_code AS 所属企业, work_no AS 作业编码, alarm_type AS 报警类型, alarm_level_name AS 报警等级, TO_CHAR(alarm_start_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF') AS 报警开始时间, TO_CHAR(alarm_clear_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF') AS 销警时间, handle_status AS 报警状态 FROM v_ai_ipark_alarm_job WHERE alarm_start_time >= SYSDATE - INTERVAL '3' HOUR;

sentence: 园区第三方人员有多少
question: 园区第三方人员有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 第三方人员总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_sys_person WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%'

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 上报企业名称, TO_CHAR(company_code) AS 第三方单位名称, TO_CHAR(name) AS 姓名, TO_CHAR(mobilePhone) AS 联系电话, TO_CHAR(position) AS 岗位名称, TO_CHAR(chemical_education_flag) AS 是否高风险岗位 FROM v_ai_ipark_sys_person WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%'

sentence: 园区有哪些第三方单位
question: 园区有哪些第三方单位
sql: SELECT  TO_CHAR(org_name) AS 单位名称,TO_CHAR(social_credit_identifier) AS 社会统一信用代码,TO_CHAR(unit_type) AS 单位类型, TO_CHAR(owner) AS 单位负责人,TO_CHAR(mobile_phone) AS 联系方式 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_unit_base_info

sentence: 某企业的详细信息
question: 某企业的详细信息
sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(abbreviatio) AS 企业简称, TO_CHAR(social_credit_id) AS 统一社会信用代码, TO_CHAR(enterprise_size) AS 企业规模, TO_CHAR(enterprise_status) AS 生产状态, TO_CHAR(industry_level_two) AS 所属行业大类, TO_CHAR(establish_date) AS 成立日期, TO_CHAR(factory_area) AS 厂区面积, TO_CHAR(produce_address) AS 生产场所地址, TO_CHAR(enterprise_leader_name) AS 企业负责人, TO_CHAR(en_leader_mobile_phone) AS 企业负责人手机, TO_CHAR(practitioner_num) AS 从业人员人数, TO_CHAR(is_hazard_source) AS 是否涉及两重点一重大（重大危险源/重点监管危险化学品/重点监管危险化工工艺）, TO_CHAR(rules_on_corporate) AS 是否规上企业, TO_CHAR(enterprise_label) AS 企业标签 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) LIKE '%{company_name}%';

sentence: 园区有哪些企业涉及重大危险源
question: 园区有哪些企业涉及重大危险源
sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(is_hazard_source) AS 是否涉及重大危险源 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(is_hazard_source) LIKE '%是%';

sentence: 园区有哪些企业涉及重点监管危险化工工艺
question: 园区有哪些企业涉及重点监管危险化工工艺
sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(is_supervision_chemical) AS 是否涉及重点监管危化品 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(is_supervision_chemical) = '是';
